Problem Statement
Team Vidhidnya
Title : LexisGraph: A Graph-Based Retrieval-Augmented Generation (GraphRAG) System for Automated Regulatory Gap Analysis.
Problem Description :
Corporate Organizations struggle to maintain compliance with large volumes of complex and continuously evolving regulations.
Existing approaches rely on manual audits and keyword-based systems that fail to capture relationships and context within
legal data.
As a result, critical dependencies, cross-references, and conflicts are missed, leading to incomplete compliance analysis,
regulatory violations, and significant legal risk.
Target Users / Stakeholders : Significance of the Problem :
High Risk of Non-Compliance: Undetected gaps and conflicts
Stakeholder Pain Point Lexisgraph
increase the likelihood of regulatory violations and legal penalties.

LexisGraph
Team Vidhidnya
Proposed Solution : Addressing the Problem :
LexisGraph is an AI-based platform that analyzes internal policies Automation: The system automates compliance analysis, replacing slow and error-prone manual
against regulatory documents to detect compliance gaps, and conflicts. auditing with a faster, scalable, and more reliable approach.
The system transforms unstructured legal text into a structured Semantic Understanding: It overcomes the limitations of keyword-based and rule-driven systems
by enabling accurate understanding of the context and meaning of legal documents.

relationships such as dependencies, conflicts, and amendments.
creates direct and structured mappings between legal requirements and organizational policies.
Using a Graph-Based Retrieval-Augmented Generation (GraphRAG)
GraphRAG Reasoning: Using GraphRAG and multi-hop reasoning, the system identifies hidden
approach, it retrieves contextually relevant legal information through
dependencies, cross-references, and conflicts that are typically missed by traditional methods.

This enables deep semantic understanding and accurate mapping

Based on this analysis, the system identifies compliance gaps,
including missing, conflicting, and outdated clauses within policies.
The system generates clear, detailed, and explainable compliance
reports with traceable legal references, enabling organizations to
System
maintain alignment with continuously evolving regulations.
Flow
Key Features & Uniqueness :
Knowledge Graph Engine: AI-powered engine ingests regulatory and policy
data and structures it into a unified knowledge graph with clause-level links.
Retrieval Engine: GraphRAG engine performs context-aware retrieval with
multi-hop reasoning, going beyond traditional keyword-based approaches.
Relational Reasoning: Reasoning engine maps regulations with internal
policies to identify relationships and inconsistencies in legal structures.
Compliance Intelligence: Compliance engine detects missing, conflicting,
and outdated clauses and generates clear, explainable reports with traceable
legal references for better compliance decisions.
